signals.evidence: POC will not move forward... re-assessing priorities (Karen Pagorek, Next_Step 11 May)
Doing a deep dive on another eternal I/O provider. Did not indicate which one.
Eduardo Viera: 'We are evaluating options and Zycus is one of those. Karen will be sharing more details.'
'has accepted a 20th July Connect' — Arthur/Karen touch base (Event + open Task)
'POC for ANA and Spend was positive' (Next_Step, post 3/31 POV delivery)
CFO Joshua Jepsen (Executive Sponsor, true EB on $450K) — zero activity on record
12/18 asks unfulfilled: VE benchmark sheet (70-80 data points), iSaaS module write-up, Tenneco/Federal-Mogul reference call

top_rationale: Deep, genuine evaluation through Q1 2026 (pricing deep-dive 12/18, POV delivered 3/31) has STALLED: on 11 May Karen Pagorek paused the POC and said John Deere is 're-assessing priorities.'
Buyer is actively deep-diving a competing 'eternal I/O provider' (unidentified) on top of GEP and a strong internal TCS/OpenAI build — a rival was prioritized AHEAD of Zycus.
Executive coverage is thin: sponsor Eduardo Viera replied lukewarm 12 Jun ('evaluating options, Zycus is one of those') and CFO Joshua Jepsen — the true EB on a $450K deal — has never engaged.
Serial slippage: close date pushed 3x (Mar->Jun->Sep 2026->Feb 2027) and ~7 months in Shortlisted; the Best Case forecast is no longer defensible.
Still alive, not eliminated: POV feedback on ANA + Spend was positive and a buyer-accepted reconnect is set for 20 Jul (Karen Pagorek) — a narrow re-engagement window.
Single-threaded on a weakening champion (Karen Pagorek) who lacks access to Eduardo; several Zycus commitments from the 12/18 asks (VE sheet, iSaaS write-up, reference call) remain overdue.

drivers: ⚠️ POC paused since 11 May — buyer 're-assessing priorities' and the POC 'will not move forward'; the core evaluation is stalled. ► Use the 20 Jul reconnect to lock a concrete POC-restart scope + date, not another touch base.

⚠️ Buyer is deep-diving a competing 'eternal I/O provider' (plus GEP and a strong internal TCS/OpenAI build) — a rival was prioritized ahead of us. ► Uncover the alternative's identity and build a head-to-head counter for 7/20.

⚠️ Executive buyer thin: Eduardo Viera lukewarm ('Zycus is one of those,' 12 Jun) and CFO Joshua Jepsen (true EB) never engaged. ► Multi-thread directly to Eduardo and map a path to the CFO for real sponsorship.
⚠️ Serial slippage: close pushed 3x (Mar->Jun->Sep 2026->Feb 2027) and 7+ months in Shortlisted; Best Case is over-stated. ► Correct the forecast/stage in Salesforce to reflect the paused reality.

✅ Genuine differentiation demonstrated and POV feedback on ANA + Spend was positive — Zycus is still in consideration, not eliminated. ► Convert that positive ANA/Spend read into a written, buyer-accepted value case.
✅ Buyer-accepted reconnect on 20 Jul (Karen Pagorek) keeps a live re-engagement window open.
win.focus_now: Turn the 20 Jul reconnect into a committed POC-restart (scope + date) and open a direct line to Eduardo Viera / the CFO — otherwise the paused eval decays into a competitive/in-house loss.
win.ceiling_applied: Shortlisted -> RFP-round ceiling 60 (not binding; score set below the 50 anchor by paused POC, fresh competitor-ahead signal, and 3x close-date slippage).

drivers: ✅ Dated, buyer-accepted reconnect on 20 Jul (Karen Pagorek) — a live forward milestone that anchors the floor.

⚠️ Underlying pulse is soft: only one real two-way buyer touch in 30d (Eduardo's 12 Jun email), and it was lukewarm/deflecting. ► Land a substantive working session (POC restart or VE review), not another touch base.
⚠️ POC paused 11 May -> process-mode is OFF (anti-zombie: buyer paused), so stalling drag applies. ► Re-open a live deliverable to re-enter a real evaluation cadence.
⚠️ Recent motion is rep-driven: could-not-connect calls (Kathleen 2 Jul, Gia 3 Jun) and one-way emails; the customer rarely initiates. ► Get the buyer to own the next step at 7/20.
⚠️ Close date pushed 145 days on 11 May (3rd push) — timing slippage. ► Agree a realistic, buyer-owned timeline at reconnect.
✅ Eduardo replied within window (12 Jun), keeping cross-channel engagement alive and suppressing a full one-way penalty.
mom.focus_now: Convert the 20 Jul touch base into a real working session with a buyer-owned next step — the score is floored by the scheduled reconnect, not by genuine buyer pull.

prospect_requirements.item: Value-engineering benchmark sheet (70-80 procurement data points comparing JD's AP cycle time, sourcing time, contract time vs Hackett/APQC + Zycus case studies)
Reference call with a comparable manufacturer (Tenneco Automotive / Federal-Mogul named on the 12/18 call)
iSaaS module write-up + reinforced definitions disentangling iSource e-auctions vs autonomous sourcing-with-negotiation

zycus_commitments.item: Diagnostic call to fully understand POC-halt ramifications (on-hold vs in-house build vs competitive loss)
zycus_commitments.grounding_quote: Have reached out to set a phone call to fully understand ramifications (on hold, in-house build, or competitive loss)

zycus_commitments.item: Send the business case / VE sheet + a sample output
zycus_commitments.grounding_quote: I'll send the sort of what I'll call the the business case, the v e sheet, and a sample output

zycus_commitments.item: Send a separate write-up on the iSaaS module
zycus_commitments.grounding_quote: I will also send a write up on the iSaaS module separately just so you have it
one of the ones that jumps to mind is, Tenneco Automotive Federal Mogul... yeah, let's do that

waiting_on_buyer.item: Identity + positioning of the competing 'eternal I/O provider' John Deere is deep-diving
Go/no-go on resuming the paused POC + confirmation of where Zycus sits in the priority re-assessment
3-month indirect spend data slice to re-start the Spend Analytics proof-of-value

best_practices.item: Multi-thread to the economic buyer: directly engage Eduardo Viera and map a path to CFO Joshua Jepsen for genuine exec sponsorship
best_practices.rank_reason: Single-threaded on a weakening champion + true EB never engaged is the deal-killer during an active priority re-assessment

best_practices.item: On 7/20, diagnose the pause and counter the competitive/in-house alternative (restart the stage gate)
best_practices.rank_reason: Buyer doubt about priority/fit is the one blocker to re-opening the evaluation

best_practices.item: Rebuild the ROI/business case with VE benchmarks + reference to convert Karen's 'pretty optimistic' skepticism into accepted value
best_practices.rank_reason: Unvalidated ROI (the $48M/40% claims) is the metrics gap blocking advancement

best_practices.item: Correct the system of record: align forecast/stage to reality (Best Case with a paused POC is over-stated)
best_practices.rank_reason: Forecast hygiene/defensibility for an at-risk, serially-slipped deal
